description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master, pull requests, and workflow dispatch. The workflow has multiple jobs: unix-like, linux_lint, and windows. The unix-like job runs on ubuntu-20.04 and macos-12 with various configurations, installing dependencies, running tests and benchmarks. The linux_lint job runs on ubuntu-20.04, installing dependencies and running lint tests. The windows job runs on windows-2022 and windows-2019, installing dependencies and running tests and benchmarks.
